mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental (user_id, copy_id, rental_date, due_date, rental_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{copyId}, #{rentalDate}, #{dueDate}, #{rentalStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, bc.book_id FROM rental r JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id WHERE r.rental_id = #{rentalId}

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, b.title AS book_title, bc.book_id FROM rental r JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.rental_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE rental SET return_date = #{returnDate}, rental_status = 'RETURNED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE rental_id = #{rentalId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND rental_status IN ('RENTED', 'OVERDUE')
SELECT copy_id FROM book_copy WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 'AVAILABLE' LIMIT 1
SELECT copy_id FROM book_copy WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 'RESERVED' LIMIT 1

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM rental r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY r.rental_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), r.due_date) AS overdue_days FROM rental r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.rental_status IN ('RENTED', 'OVERDUE') AND r.due_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY r.due_date ASC

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title, CASE WHEN r.rental_status IN ('RENTED', 'OVERDUE') AND r.due_date < CURDATE() THEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), r.due_date) ELSE 0 END AS overdue_days FROM rental r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY r.rental_date DESC

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title, CASE WHEN r.rental_status IN ('RENTED', 'OVERDUE') AND r.due_date < CURDATE() THEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), r.due_date) ELSE 0 END AS overdue_days FROM rental r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.rental_status = #{status} ORDER BY r.rental_date DESC

SELECT r.rental_id, r.user_id, r.copy_id, r.rental_date, r.due_date, r.return_date, r.rental_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title, CASE WHEN r.rental_status IN ('RENTED', 'OVERDUE') AND r.due_date < CURDATE() THEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), r.due_date) ELSE 0 END AS overdue_days FROM rental r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN book_copy bc ON r.copy_id = bc.copy_id JOIN book b ON bc.book_id = b.book_id WHERE u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY r.rental_date DESC
